description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle ("Cruise AV"), operating in manual mode, was parked in a parking space in a Costco garage facility. As the 
Cruise AV operator was reversing out of the parking space, the Cruise AV made contact with a cement pillar, damaging the front driver side 
radar assembly of the Cruise AV. There were no reported injuries.
Print
Clear Form
